content:
# IVX FINAL PRODUCTION CUTOVER — PUSH, DEPLOY, BUILD, TEST AND VERIFY END TO END

MODE: EXECUTE NOW
PRIORITY: P0 RELEASE
GOAL: Deploy the latest verified IVX fixes to production, build the final Android APK, test on a real device, and return complete proof.

IMPORTANT:
- Do not return a plan only.
- Do not return narrative claims.
- Execute every available step now.
- Do not mark VERIFIED without live production evidence.
- Do not claim 100M-user readiness.
- Current scale limitations must remain documented separately.
- Do not ask for credentials unless a real runtime request proves missing, expired, revoked, 401 or 403.
- Never expose secret values.

==================================================
PHASE 1 — CONFIRM RELEASE SOURCE
==================================================

1. Verify the correct owner-controlled repository:
   ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest

2. Verify:
   - production branch
   - local HEAD SHA
   - origin/main SHA
   - uncommitted files
   - unpushed commits
   - active backend service
   - active landing deployment
   - active mobile version/build

3. Include all completed fixes intended for this release:
   - IVX Owner AI provider correction
   - AI gateway endpoint correction
   - execution guard correction
   - message persistence
   - attachment upload
   - owner authentication stabilization
   - new canonical reel card
   - removal of old customer-facing reel card
   - Deal Detail infinite-loading fix
   - feed cache/TTL fix
   - relevant query optimizations
   - production diagnostics cleanup

4. Do not include experimental, incomplete or unrelated changes.

==================================================
PHASE 2 — PRE-DEPLOYMENT RELEASE GATE
==================================================

Run the repository’s real commands:

- locked dependency install
- lint
- typecheck
- unit tests
- integration tests
- backend smoke tests
- production web build
- Expo configuration validation
- Android production build validation

Critical release tests:

□ Owner login
□ Logout and login again
□ Session persistence
□ Owner AI message
□ Owner AI attachment
□ Message persistence after reload
□ Main feed
□ Reels feed
□ Casa Rosario Deal Detail
□ View Deal
□ Invest Now
□ Members
□ Investors
□ Properties
□ Landing page
□ Health endpoint
□ Authorization enforcement

Release rule:

- P0 failures: zero allowed
- P1 failures in changed release scope: zero allowed
- Unrelated pre-existing tests must be listed separately and must not be hidden

==================================================
PHASE 3 — COMMIT AND PUSH
==================================================

1. Review the final diff.
2. Commit all approved release changes.
3. Push to the correct production branch.
4. Confirm GitHub accepted the push.
5. Read origin/main again and prove it equals the release SHA.

Return:

- repository
- branch
- commit SHA
- commit timestamp
- push timestamp
- changed files
- GitHub comparison result

Do not continue using a local-only commit.

==================================================
PHASE 4 — BACKEND DEPLOYMENT
==================================================

1. Trigger the correct Render production service.
2. Confirm Render is bound to the correct repository and branch.
3. Capture:
   - service name
   - deployment ID
   - release SHA
   - build start
   - build finish
   - deployment status
   - boot timestamp

4. Wait for deployment completion.

5. Verify production endpoints:

- /health
- /version
- /readiness
- Owner AI route
- Deal route
- attachment route
- protected owner route

6. Confirm:
   deployed SHA = GitHub release SHA

7. If auto-deploy fails:
   - identify the exact reason
   - trigger manual deployment
   - do not stop at “deployment pending”

==================================================
PHASE 5 — LANDING PAGE DEPLOYMENT
==================================================

Deploy the current landing page release.

Verify live:

□ New canonical reel card is visible
□ Old customer-facing reel card is removed
□ Casa Rosario opens correctly
□ No infinite loading
□ Registration works
□ Images and video load
□ Mobile layout works
□ No jumping or layout shift
□ Production API is used
□ No mock data
□ No stale CDN content

Clear deployment/CDN cache where required.

Return:

- landing deploy ID
- deployed SHA
- production URL
- live verification result

==================================================
PHASE 6 — FINAL ANDROID APK
==================================================

Create a new signed production APK.

Requirements:

- increment version/build number
- latest production code
- production environment
- correct production API URLs
- no diagnostic banner
- no debug menu
- no development text
- no test credentials
- no stale bundle
- no unnecessary Rork Cloud dependency
- correct app icon/name/package

Return:

- APK filename
- direct APK download link
- version
- build number
- build ID
- signing result
- file size
- checksum
- build timestamp

==================================================
PHASE 7 — REAL ANDROID DEVICE QA
==================================================

Install the final APK on a real Android device.

Perform:

1. Clean installation
2. Cold launch
3. Owner login
4. Logout
5. Login again
6. Kill app and reopen
7. Confirm session persistence
8. Open Main
9. Open Reels
10. Confirm new reel design
11. Confirm old reel card is gone
12. Open Casa Rosario
13. Confirm Deal Detail loads
14. Tap View Deal
15. Tap Invest Now
16. Return to same feed position
17. Open Owner AI
18. Send a text message
19. Upload one image
20. Upload one PDF
21. Reload conversation
22. Confirm persistence
23. Open Members
24. Open Investors
25. Open Properties
26. Test Android back button
27. Test slow-network recovery
28. Confirm no crash
29. Confirm no infinite loading
30. Confirm no diagnostic banner

Capture screenshots or video evidence.

==================================================
PHASE 8 — LIVE PRODUCTION QA
==================================================

Test the deployed system using real production routes.

OWNER AI:
- live user message ID
- AI response ID
- trace ID
- provider
- model
- HTTP status
- persistence result
- attachment result

DEALS:
- Main → Casa Rosario
- Reels → Casa Rosario
- Landing → Casa Rosario
- direct route → Casa Rosario
- View Deal
- Invest Now
- invalid deal ID
- network timeout
- API 404 handling

AUTH:
- owner login
- invalid password
- expired session
- session refresh
- protected route
- non-owner denial

DATA:
- members load
- investors load
- properties load
- correct counts
- no duplicates caused by release

==================================================
PHASE 9 — DEPLOYMENT SAFETY
==================================================

Verify:

- no secret leakage
- no destructive database migration
- no real payment test
- no duplicate investment transaction
- no authorization regression
- no owner-route exposure
- backup/rollback path identified
- previous stable SHA recorded
- rollback procedure available

If a critical production test fails:

1. Stop release.
2. Record evidence.
3. Fix the issue.
4. Redeploy.
5. Repeat the failed test.
6. Roll back if a safe fix cannot be completed.

==================================================
PHASE 10 — SCALE STATUS
==================================================

Do not claim 100M readiness.

Report separately:

- verified current concurrency
- tested maximum
- breaking point
- current Render plan limitation
- Redis status
- database optimization status
- remaining scale work

This information does not block the present release unless the normal production smoke test fails.

==================================================
MANDATORY FINAL REPORT
==================================================

TASK UNDERSTOOD:
[exact release completed]

RELEASE SCOPE:
-
-

FILES CHANGED:
-
-

PRE-DEPLOYMENT TESTS:
- Lint:
- Typecheck:
- Unit:
- Integration:
- Backend smoke:
- Web build:
- Android validation:

GITHUB PROOF:
- Repository:
- Branch:
- Commit SHA:
- Origin SHA:
- Commit timestamp:
- Push timestamp:
- Commit URL/reference:

BACKEND DEPLOYMENT:
- Render service:
- Deploy ID:
- Status:
- Deployed SHA:
- Build start:
- Build finish:
- Boot time:
- Health:
- Version:
- Readiness:

LANDING DEPLOYMENT:
- Deploy ID:
- Deployed SHA:
- URL:
- New reel card:
- Old card removed:
- Casa Rosario:
- Registration:
- Mobile QA:

ANDROID BUILD:
- APK:
- Download link:
- Version:

- Build ID:

REAL-DEVICE PROOF:
- Device:
- Android version:
- Clean install:
- Owner login:
- Session persistence:
- Main:
- Reels:
- Deal Detail:
- View Deal:
- Invest Now:
- Owner AI:
- Image attachment:

OWNER AI LIVE PROOF:

- Response ID:
- Trace ID:

DEAL LIVE PROOF:
- Main route:
- Reels route:
- Landing route:
- Deal API status:
- Casa Rosario record ID:
- View Deal:
- Invest Now:

BUGS FIXED:
1.
2.
3.

REMAINING RELEASE ISSUES:
- NONE or exact issue

SCALE STATUS:
- Verified current capacity:
- Maximum tested:
- Breaking point:
- 100M readiness: NOT VERIFIED
- Remaining scale work:

ROLLBACK:
- Previous stable SHA:
- Rollback method:

FINAL STATUS:
VERIFIED / FAILED / BLOCKED

VERIFIED RULE:
Use VERIFIED only when:
- release SHA is pushed
- Render deploy ID exists
- production SHA matches GitHub
- landing is live
- final APK exists
- APK is installed on a real device
- owner login passes
- Owner AI passes
- attachment passes
- Main/Reels/Deal Detail pass
- no P0 or P1 release-scope issue remains
